positive: A clean, stylized illustration of a magnificent soaring mountain owl (Bubo bubo), rendered in a geometric, minimalist linework style with bold negative space. The owl is centered, depicted in sharp silhouette against a stylized, vibrant watercolor-splatter background of deep teal, burnt orange, and creamy cream. The composition should be highly contrasting and symmetrical, suitable for screen printing. Include subtle, abstract mountain range line art peeking out from behind the main subject. Graphic, vector art quality. Highly detailed.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, trademark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, photo, photorealistic, grainy
